excludeFromGallery.description: Exclude this fragment from the visual gallery screenshots

pageConfig.description: Custom configuration overrides for the seeded test page

pageLayout.description: Layout configuration for the fragment container

requiredObjects.description: Objects definitions required by this fragment

documents.description: Documents and Media files to upload and seed

verification.description: Per-fragment custom success criteria applied by fragments.spec.js after generic checks. Any failure here causes the Playwright test to report 'failed' and the gallery to show 🔴 Failed (Test).

requiredSelectors.description: CSS selectors that must be present and meet the minCount threshold for the test to pass

selector.description: CSS selector to locate elements within the fragment

minCount.description: Minimum number of matching elements required (default: 1)

description.description: Human-readable explanation of what this check verifies — shown in test failure output

forbiddenSelectors.description: CSS selectors that must NOT be visible for the test to pass (e.g. error banners, fallback UI)

selector.description: CSS selector to locate elements that must not be visible

description.description: Human-readable explanation of what this check verifies — shown in test failure output
